scenario: Pinnacle Marketplace runs Camunda 8.8 with 18000 orders per day. During an incident window, an operator must cancel exactly 1 stuck order-checkout instance from Operate without touching any of the other 200 running instances of the same deployed process, and wants to know where on the Processes tab the per-instance cancel control sits.
question: Where does the userguide place the control to cancel a single running process instance from the Processes tab view of a deployed process?

options.text: Inside a bulk Operations dialog at the top of the Processes tab, where the operator selects 1 instance from the list and confirms the cancel action via a checkbox
Inside the modeled BPMN diagram on the Processes tab, by clicking the running token marker on the activity and choosing cancel from a context menu next to the token
Inside the side Incidents panel that opens when the process model is rendered, where each incident row carries a cancel icon for the related instance under the activity name
Inside the Operations column on the instance row of the Processes tab, where a cancel icon next to the running instance cancels that single instance when clicked

a.text: Incorrect. The View a deployed process flow does not describe a bulk Operations dialog at the top of the Processes tab; cancellation of a single instance is performed via the per-row cancel icon under Operations.

b.text: Incorrect. The BPMN diagram on the Processes tab visualises tokens but the documented cancel action is not a click on a token; the userguide places the cancel icon next to the instance under Operations.

c.text: Incorrect. The cancel icon shown in the userguide is part of the Operations column on the running-instance list under the model, not a per-row control inside an Incidents panel.

d.text: Correct. Step 3 of View a deployed process states that from the Processes tab the operator cancels a single running process instance by clicking the cancel icon under Operations next to that instance, which scopes the action to exactly that instance.

explanation: On the Processes tab the userguide shows the running instances under the model and tells the operator that a single instance can be cancelled by clicking the cancel icon under the Operations column next to that specific instance row, keeping the action scoped to just that one process instance.
